name: Lacework FortiCNAPP
description: Cloud-native application protection platform providing runtime threat detection, vulnerability management, and compliance via REST API v2

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve security alerts with optional time range and severity filters

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start of the time range in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End of the time range in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (Critical, High, Medium, Low, Info)

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific alert by ID

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: List Vulnerabilities
actions.description: List host or container vulnerability assessments

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Array of filter objects for querying vulnerabilities

actions.name: Get Compliance Report
actions.description: Retrieve the latest compliance assessment report for a specific cloud account

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Cloud account ID for the compliance report

actions.name: List Datasources
actions.description: List all available datasources for querying cloud activity and configuration data

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Execute a custom query against Lacework datasources for cloud activity and configuration analysis

parameters.name: arguments
parameters.description: Query arguments including StartTimeRange and EndTimeRange

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all security policies and their current enabled/disabled status

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low, info)
